data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the financial penalty requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the financial penalty for cancellations within 48 hours, but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the penalty but lacks specific evidence of its implementation or tracking mechanism. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive as there is no definitive proof of the requirement being met.
gaps: No evidence of cancellation tracking mechanism or penalty application.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
